description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a modern, urban appearance, featuring a fitted jacket over a cropped top and slim pants. The figure has a distinct hairstyle with short, voluminous curls swept to one side, partially covering one eye. The facial features are stylized, with a visible eye patch or accessory over the left eye. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and the posture is upright and natural. The shoes are simple and streamlined, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The overall look suggests a confident, fashion-forward individual commonly seen in city settings.
description: A modern adult pedestrian with a fitted jacket, cropped top, slim pants, and short curly hair swept to one side, standing upright with a confident urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fitted jacket, cropped top, slim pants, and the distinctive hairstyle covering one eye.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the volume of the hair, and the slim silhouette of the outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, pants, and the rounded shape of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the relaxed arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted jacket, cropped top, slim pants, and simple shoes
attribute_hairstyle: short curly hair swept to one side
